_comment: Recent maintenance work-order history per asset. Lets the agent flag recurring failures (the thing a paper binder can't do). Illustrative for demo.

CONV-L3.summary: Replaced drive-pulley bearing BRG-6206-2RS; grinding at drive end.
Replaced drive-pulley bearing BRG-6206-2RS again; noise + heat at drive end.
Adjusted take-up, re-tensioned belt; minor mistracking.
